assertions.assertion: Adds or references the Duende.IdentityServer.Configuration.EntityFramework NuGet package
assertions.rationale: References Duende.IdentityServer.EntityFramework (the general EF package), NOT the DCR-specific Duende.IdentityServer.Configuration.EntityFramework package

assertions.assertion: Calls AddClientConfigurationStore() on the IdentityServer configuration builder
assertions.rationale: Uses AddConfigurationStore() and AddOperationalStore() (the general EF stores), NOT AddClientConfigurationStore() which is DCR-specific

assertions.assertion: Warns against using in-memory stores for dynamically registered clients in production
assertions.rationale: States 'Don't use in-memory stores in production for DCR clients'

assertions.assertion: Does NOT suggest implementing IClientConfigurationStore from scratch when the EF package is available
assertions.rationale: Mentions implementing a custom IClientStore only as a secondary option
